summary: Add a DFM % Developed curve plot.
details: Right-clicking the DFM Ratios selected-summary table now offers `Show Percentage Developed Curve`.

The new floating plot window charts the `% Developed` row against the matching Data-tab development-month labels for each ratio column, so `(1) 11-23` plots at month 11 rather than month 23 or column index 1.
The first segment starts at month 1 and ends at the first actual point, so monthly values such as months 1-13 are interpolated before a month-14 actual point.

Each ratio-column segment has its own curve selector arranged in a horizontally scrollable `Curve Type By Segment` table with `Period` and `Curve Type` rows, defaulting to linear interpolation with smooth, step, exponential, logarithmic, and power choices available per segment.

The curve window can optionally load the same Reserving Class path and DFM method name from a prior project and overlay that project's `% Developed` curve; the prior-project input includes the shared project tree picker, and missing or incomplete matches show an error and do not add a line.
